description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Emscripten that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: build-win10, build-linux, and build-macos, each running on a different environment (windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macos-latest respectively). Each job clones two repositories (DiligentTools and DiligentCore), configures Ninja and Emscripten SDK, and builds the project using CMake.
